overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring two characters in a neon-lit urban environment mixing futuristic architecture with traditional elements. The foreground character leans against a glowing green wall before turning and moving toward a stone pagoda, while vibrant pink and red neon lights illuminate the wet concrete surroundings.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy neon-lit night in a futuristic city. The ego character leans against a glowing green wall with a large white circular light, smoking and looking upward. A second character in red approaches from the left and stops near a traditional stone pagoda, standing with hands on hips. The area is sheltered with wet concrete ground reflecting the vibrant pink and red neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban alley with traditional pagoda

events.description: ego character pushes off the wall, turns around revealing a large back tattoo, and walks toward the stone pagoda

agents.ego_description: turning away from the wall and walking toward the stone pagoda, revealing intricate back tattoos and red thigh-high boots

notable_agents.action: remaining stationary with hands on hips, watching the ego character's movement

entered.detail: tall orange and yellow vending machine or kiosk panel with perforated metal texture becoming visible as the camera shifts

segments.scene_description: The ego character pushes off the green wall and turns around, revealing a large detailed tattoo on her back. She walks away from the wall toward the stone pagoda, passing by the structure as an orange vending machine becomes visible on the right. The background character remains stationary near the stairs, observing the movement. The neon lighting continues to cast vibrant pink and red hues across the wet concrete surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit urban alley that shifts from a static moment of reflection to a purposeful walk toward a traditional structure. It begins with the ego character leaning against a glowing green wall and a large white circular light, smoking while looking upward as another character in red approaches a nearby stone pagoda. As the ego character pushes off the wall and turns, the camera reveals a detailed tattoo on her back while she begins to move forward. The scene then expands to show her walking across wet concrete reflecting vibrant pink and red hues, passing the stationary observer by the pagoda. Finally, the perspective shifts to reveal an orange vending machine on the right as she continues her path through the futuristic cityscape.
